title: Same Artwork. 5 Packs. 70 Files. What a Complete Etsy Listing Looks Like.
caption:
One design. 5 packs. 70 files.

This is what a complete Etsy listing looks like:

→ 2:3 US Portrait: 4×6, 8×12, 12×18, 20×30
→ 3:4 Gallery Standard: 6×8, 9×12, 12×16, 18×24
→ 4:5 Most Searched: 8×10, 16×20, 24×30
→ ISO A-series: A4, A3, A5 (EU · UK · AU)
→ Extras: 5×7, 11×14, 5×5 square

One upload. SnapToSize generates every pack simultaneously — 300 DPI, named, under Etsy's 20MB cap.

Link in bio -> app.snaptosize.com
